User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system (student, teacher, or admin).

photoUrl.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

Subject.title: Subject
Subject.description: Represents a subject or course offered.

TeacherProfile.title: TeacherProfile
TeacherProfile.description: Represents a teacher's profile with additional details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the teacher profile.

description.description: Description of the teacher's experience and qualifications.

ScheduledClass.title: ScheduledClass
ScheduledClass.description: Represents a scheduled class or lesson.

id.description: Unique identifier for the scheduled class.

status.description: Status of the class (e.g., scheduled, completed, cancelled).

PaymentPackage.title: PaymentPackage
PaymentPackage.description: Represents a package of lessons that a student can purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the payment package.

name.description: Name of the payment package (e.g., 4 lessons, 8 lessons).

numberOfLessons.description: Number of lessons included in the package.

PaymentTransaction.title: PaymentTransaction
PaymentTransaction.description: Represents a payment transaction made by a student.

id.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used (e.g., PayPal, Mercado Pago).

status.description: Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed).

SessionFeedback.title: SessionFeedback
SessionFeedback.description: Represents feedback given by a student after a class session.

id.description: Unique identifier for the session feedback.

rating.description: Rating given by the student (e.g., 1-5 stars).

comments.description: Additional comments provided by the student.

feedbackDate.description: Date when the feedback was given.

ScheduledMessage.title: ScheduledMessage
ScheduledMessage.description: Represents a scheduled message to be sent to a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the scheduled message.

userId.description: Reference to User to whom the message is to be sent. (Relationship: User 1:N ScheduledMessage)

messageContent.description: Content of the message to be sent.

scheduledDateTime.description: Date and time when the message should be sent.

sent.description: Indicates whether the message has been sent.

definition.description: Stores user profiles.  Root-level collection to enable listing all users (admins only).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: subjectId
params.description: The unique identifier for the subject.

definition.description: Stores teacher profiles, linked to a specific user. Nested under /users/{userId} for ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (teacher).

params.name: teacherProfileId
params.description: The unique identifier for the teacher profile.

definition.description: Stores scheduled classes, linked to a student user. Nested under /users/{userId} for ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (student).

params.name: scheduledClassId
params.description: The unique identifier for the scheduled class.

definition.description: Stores payment packages that students can purchase.

params.name: paymentPackageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the payment package.

definition.description: Stores payment transactions made by a student user. Nested under /users/{userId} for ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (student).

params.name: paymentTransactionId
params.description: The unique identifier for the payment transaction.

definition.description: Stores session feedback given by a student, linked to a scheduled class. Nested under /users/{userId}/scheduledClasses/{scheduledClassId} for data locality and ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user (student).

params.name: scheduledClassId
params.description: The unique identifier for the scheduled class.

params.name: sessionFeedbackId
params.description: The unique identifier for the session feedback.

definition.description: Stores scheduled messages for users. Nested under /users/{userId} for ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: scheduledMessageId
params.description: The unique identifier for the scheduled message.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to ensure Authorization Independence, support required QAPs (Queries are not Filters), and maintain data integrity.

**Authorization Independence:**

*   User-owned data (TeacherProfile, ScheduledClass, PaymentTransaction, SessionFeedback, ScheduledMessage) is nested under `/users/{userId}`. This eliminates the need for `get()` calls in security rules to check user ownership. The `userId` is inherently known from the path.

**Structural Segregation & QAPs:**

*   Each top-level collection or subcollection is designed to hold documents with similar security requirements. For example, scheduled messages (`/users/{userId}/scheduledMessages/{scheduledMessageId}`) are directly owned by users, allowing for secure listing and querying.
*   The use of path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}/...`) ensures that list operations can be securely filtered based on the authenticated user's ID, without needing to read document data.

**Additional Considerations:**

*   The structure supports the app's core features, including user authentication, subject selection, scheduling, chat, feedback, payment, and role-based dashboards. The User entity includes a `role` field that can be used for role-based access control in the application logic (though security rules should rely on the path).

Scheduled Messages are now nested under the user. This allows to securely query all messages created by the user.
